senses.example: You should have had the sense to turn off the electricity before touching the wires.
senses.example_zh: 你本该懂得在触摸电线之前先切断电源。

senses.example: He sensed that his proposals were unwelcome.
senses.example_zh: 他觉得他的建议不受欢迎。

derivatives: senseless a. 无意义的;无感觉的

senses.example: It is sensible of her to stay at home on such a raining evening.
senses.example_zh: 在这样下雨的夜晚她待在家里是明智的。

senses.example: He is sensible of the danger of his position.
a sensitive issue // Photographic paper is highly sensitive to light.
senses.example_zh: 敏感的问题 // 感光纸(相纸)对光十分敏感。

senses.def_zh: 神经过敏的,容易生气的
senses.example: Belinda is sensitive to whatever people speak of her.
senses.example_zh: 贝琳达对别人谈到她的任何事情都很敏感。

senses.def_zh: (尤对疼痛)易感受的,易受伤害的
senses.example: a sensitive skin // be sensitive to cold
senses.example_zh: 易受伤的皮肤 // 对寒冷敏感的

derivatives: sensitivity n. 敏感性,灵敏度
insensitive a. 不顾他人感受的;无知觉的;感觉迟钝的

senses.def_en: capable of producing desired results without wasting materials, time, or energy
senses.example: Efficient management is one of the factors which will lower production cost.
senses.example_zh: 高效的管理是降低生产成本的因素之一。

senses.example: I have an allergy to penicillin.
senses.example_zh: 我对青霉素有过敏反应。

senses.example: In India, more than 5.7 million people are infected with AIDS.
senses.example_zh: 在印度,有 570 多万人感染了艾滋病。

senses.def_en: to make sb. share a particular feeling
senses.example: Mary's high spirits infected all the girls in the class.
senses.example_zh: 玛丽振奋的精神感染了班上所有的女孩子。

derivatives: infectious a. 传染的;有感染力的

senses.example: The wound needs to be disinfected.

derivatives: disinfectant a. 消毒的 n. 消毒剂

entries.mnemonic: epi(among)+dem(人们)+ic→在人们中间盛行的→流传极广的

senses.example: Doctors warn that a flu epidemic may be on the way.
senses.example_zh: 医生警告说可能要发生流感。

senses.example: When tennis became a fashion, there was an epidemic of white socks and canvas shoe.
senses.example_zh: 当网球运动成为一种时尚时,白色短袜和帆布运动鞋也流行起来。

senses.example: Buying goods on the installment plan has become epidemic in recent years.
senses.example_zh: 近几年来,用分期付款的办法购物十分流行。

senses.def_en: able to be passed from one person or animal to another by touching
senses.example: It's a highly contagious infection, so don't let anyone else use your towel.
senses.example_zh: 这种病极易传染,所以别让任何人用你的毛巾。

senses.example: Nothing is so contagious as enthusiasm.
senses.example_zh: 热情是最富有感染力的。

extras.title: sense
extras.content: in a sense 从某种意义上说 // out of one's senses 心智不健全的 // make sense 有意义 Don't waste time in the nonsense. Please make sense. 别浪费时间尽说废话,说话请言之有理。
